TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Frank Brickowski nalecuhan i Bayville, New York, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Frank Brickowski i 1981 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 57, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. tatama, nalecuhan i 8 a bulad 14 a demiad, 1959 a mihcan, Frank Brickowski, u miunduay ciniza.
S.PHON: frank briʦkowski nar~ɾəʦuħan i baj*ir~ɾr~ɾə, nəw jork, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. frank briʦkowski i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu nəw jork kniʦks putiput. tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan i * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦan, frank briʦkowski, u miunduaj ʦiniza.
S.FORM: Frank Brickowski nalecuhan i Bayville, New York, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Frank Brickowski i 1981 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 3 ku uwac atu silsil 57, namapili' tu nu New York Knicks putiput. tatama, nalecuhan i 8 a bulad 14 a demiad, 1959 a mihcan, Frank Brickowski, u miunduay ciniza.
S.PHON: frank briʦkowski nar~ɾəʦuħan i baj*ir~ɾr~ɾə, nəw jork, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. frank briʦkowski i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ **, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu nəw jork kniʦks putiput. tatama, nar~ɾəʦuħan i * a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad, **** a miħʦan, frank briʦkowski, u miunduaj ʦiniza.
